apps.name: GitHub Repo Manager & Cleaner
apps.subtitle: AI-powered GitHub repository management
apps.description: Electron desktop app for managing, cleaning, and organizing GitHub repositories with AI-powered features like smart rename, README generation, and commit analysis.
apps.longDescription: A comprehensive Electron desktop application that streamlines GitHub repository management with AI-powered features. Manage all your repositories with source/fork distinction, publish local projects to GitHub with smart .gitignore generation, analyze stale and large repos, sync forks, and leverage AI for smart renaming, description generation, README creation, and commit message optimization using Conventional Commits standards.
features: View and manage all GitHub repositories with Source/Fork filtering
Publish local folders to GitHub with smart .gitignore generation
AI Smart Rename and description generation via OpenRouter API
AI-powered README creation and commit message analysis
Repository analysis: stale repos, large repos, unchanged forks
Fork sync status checking and one-click synchronization
Commit message templates: Simple, Conventional, Scoped, Custom
apps.requirements: GitHub Personal Access Token, OpenRouter API Key (for AI features)
